{"columns":[{"header":{"content":"N°","style":{"border":"1px solid #ccc","font-size":"12px","vertical-align":"middle","text-align":"center","background-color":"#0096ff","font-weight":"normal","white-space":"nowrap","height":"36px","color":"#ffffff","border-color":"#0096ff"}},"body":{"content":"{product.index}","style":{"background-color":"white","border":"1px solid #DDDDDD","padding":"3px 5px","border-color":"#0096ff","text-align":"right"}}},{"header":{"content":"Nom du produit","style":{"border":"1px solid #ccc","font-size":"12px","vertical-align":"middle","text-align":"center","background-color":"#0096ff","font-weight":"normal","white-space":"nowrap","height":"36px","color":"#ffffff","border-color":"#0096ff"}},"body":{"content":"{product.name}
{product.description}","style":{"background-color":"white","border":"1px solid #DDDDDD","padding":"3px 5px","border-color":"#0096ff"}}},{"header":{"content":"Prix","style":{"border":"1px solid #ccc","font-size":"12px","vertical-align":"middle","text-align":"center","background-color":"#0096ff","font-weight":"normal","white-space":"nowrap","height":"36px","color":"#ffffff","border-color":"#0096ff"}},"body":{"content":"{product.pivot.price_value}","style":{"background-color":"white","border":"1px solid #DDDDDD","padding":"3px 5px","border-color":"#0096ff"}}},{"header":{"content":"Taxe","style":{"border":"1px solid #ccc","font-size":"12px","vertical-align":"middle","text-align":"center","background-color":"#0096ff","font-weight":"normal","white-space":"nowrap","height":"36px","color":"#ffffff","border-color":"#0096ff"}},"body":{"content":"{product.pivot.tax_percent} %","style":{"background-color":"white","border":"1px solid #DDDDDD","padding":"3px 5px","border-color":"#0096ff"}}},{"header":{"content":"Qté","style":{"border":"1px solid #ccc","font-size":"12px","vertical-align":"middle","text-align":"center","background-color":"#0096ff","font-weight":"normal","white-space":"nowrap","height":"36px","color":"#ffffff","border-color":"#0096ff"}},"body":{"content":"{product.pivot.quantity}","style":{"background-color":"white","border":"1px solid #DDDDDD","padding":"3px 5px","border-color":"#0096ff"}}},{"header":{"content":"Taxe total","style":{"border":"1px solid #ccc","font-size":"12px","vertical-align":"middle","text-align":"center","background-color":"#0096ff","font-weight":"normal","white-space":"nowrap","height":"36px","color":"#ffffff","border-color":"#0096ff"}},"body":{"content":"{product.pivot.total_tax_value} {product.pivot.currency}","style":{"background-color":"white","border":"1px solid #DDDDDD","padding":"3px 5px","border-color":"#0096ff"}}},{"header":{"content":"Sous total HT","style":{"border":"1px solid #ccc","font-size":"12px","vertical-align":"middle","text-align":"center","background-color":"#0096ff","font-weight":"normal","white-space":"nowrap","height":"36px","color":"#ffffff","border-color":"#0096ff"}},"body":{"content":"{product.pivot.total_price_excluding_tax} {product.pivot.currency}","style":{"background-color":"white","border":"1px solid #DDDDDD","padding":"3px 5px","border-color":"#0096ff"}}},{"header":{"content":"Sous total TTC","style":{"border":"1px solid #ccc","font-size":"12px","vertical-align":"middle","text-align":"center","background-color":"#0096ff","font-weight":"normal","white-space":"nowrap","height":"36px","color":"#ffffff","border-color":"#0096ff"}},"body":{"content":"{product.pivot.total_price_including_tax} {product.pivot.currency}","style":{"background-color":"white","border":"1px solid #DDDDDD","padding":"3px 5px","border-color":"#0096ff"}}}],"summaries":[{"header":{"content":"Total HT","style":{"padding":"2px 5px","font-weight":"bold","text-align":"right"}},"body":{"content":"{order.total_excluding_tax} {order.currency}","style":{"padding":"2px 5px","text-align":"left"}}},{"header":{"content":"TVA","style":{"padding":"2px 5px","font-weight":"bold","text-align":"right"}},"body":{"content":"{order.tax_value} {order.currency}","style":{"padding":"2px 5px","text-align":"left"}}},{"header":{"content":"Total TTC","style":{"padding":"2px 5px","font-weight":"bold","color":"#0096ff"}},"body":{"content":"{order.total_including_tax} {order.currency}","style":{"padding":"2px 5px","text-align":"left","color":"#000000"}}}]}
Date et signature du client précédé de la mention 'Bon pour accord'
